== Notes for [[Item:Q114638|Q114638]] ==

RAYMONDE, daughter of --- (-[before 15 Jun 911]). A charter dated 15 Jun 911, under which Arnust Archibishop of Narbonne donated property to Saint-Paul de Narbonne, names "infantes Majolo vicecomite et uxori suæ Raymundæ...Walchario et...Albericho vicecomite", the wording implying that the parents were deceased at that date[562]. Settipani suggests that she was the daughter of Raymond I Comte de Toulouse[563].

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/TOULOUSE NOBILITY.htm

_P_CCINFO 2-2438

1 NAME Raymonde de /Rouerges/
2 GIVN Raymonde de
2 SURN Rouerges

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I16693
# ID: I16693
# Name: Vicount Of Narbonne MAYEUL 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: ABT 830 1 2 3 4 5
# Death: 15 JUN 911 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 17 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

DATE 3 JUN 2000

OCCU Viscount de Narbonne
SOUR HAWKINS.GED
SOUR COMYN4.TAF (Compuserve) says 5 Jun 911; HAWKINS.GED says BEF Jun 911
Royalty for Commoners, Roderick W. Stuart, p. 77 says 15 Jun 911
GWALTNEY.ANC (Compuserve) 4064357392 says AFT 5 Jun 911
PAGE 31
QUAY 0



Father: Count Of Narbonne LIEVEN b: ABT 800

Marriage 1 Raimodis b: ABT 830

* Married: 870 1 2 3 4 5

Children

1. Has Children Vicount Of Narbonne AUBRI b: 849
2. Has Children Vicount Of Narbonne FRANCON II b: 873


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I19180
# D: I19180
# Name: Mayeul DE NARBONNE 1 2 3 4
# Sex: M
# Birth: ABT 845 1 2 3 4
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 4
# Change Date: 16 SEP 2001 2 3 4
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

#Générale# Vicomte de Narbonne.
Descendant d'Aimeric de NARBONNE, Comte Palatin, lui-même fils de Guillaume au Court-Nez.[Spare.FTW]

[daveanthes.FTW]

#Générale# Vicomte de Narbonne.
Descendant d'Aimeric de NARBONNE, Comte Palatin, lui-même fils de Guillaume au Court-Nez.



Marriage 1 Raaimondis DE LIMOGES b: ABT 850

Children

1. Has No Children Ulbérad DE NARBONNE b: 870
2. Has Children Albéric Ier DE MACON b: ABT 880
3. Has No Children Adèle DE SALINS b: 880


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
